properties.code_string:
<Node ToolID="200">
              <GuiSettings Plugin="AlteryxSpatialPluginsGui.SpatialMatch.SpatialMatch">
                <Position x="1015" y="603"/>
              </GuiSettings>
              <Properties>
                <Configuration>
                  <Target SpatialObj="Centroid"/>
                  <Universe SpatialObj="SpatialObj"/>
                  <Method method="T********|****T****|***T*****|*T*******"/>
                  <SelectConfiguration>
                    <Configuration outputConnection="Matched">
                      <OrderChanged value="False"/>
                      <CommaDecimal value="False"/>
                      <SelectFields>
                        <SelectField field="*Unknown" selected="True"/>
                      </SelectFields>
                    </Configuration>
                  </SelectConfiguration>
                </Configuration>
                <Annotation DisplayMode="0">
                  <Name/>
                  <DefaultAnnotationText>Centroid Where Target Touches or Intersects Universe SpatialObj</DefaultAnnotationText>
                  <Left value="False"/>
                </Annotation>
              </Properties>
              <EngineSettings EngineDll="AlteryxSpatialPluginsEngine.dll" EngineDllEntryPoint="AlteryxSpatialMatch"/>
            </Node>

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN CAST((latitude IS NULL) AS BOOLEAN) THEN NULL WHEN (latitude < 0) THEN (CEIL((latitude * 1000)) / 1000) ELSE (FLOOR((latitude * 1000)) / 1000) END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN CAST((longitude IS NULL) AS BOOLEAN) THEN NULL WHEN (longitude < 0) THEN (CEIL((longitude * 1000)) / 1000) ELSE (FLOOR((longitude * 1000)) / 1000) END) AS string)
MAX((CASE WHEN (NOT (latitude IS NULL)) THEN load_date ELSE NULL END))
(CASE WHEN (in0.address_id = in1.address_id) THEN in1.address_id ELSE NULL END)
CAST((CASE WHEN (NOT (goog_latitude IS NULL)) THEN goog_latitude ELSE CAST(latitude AS string) END) AS DOUBLE)
CAST((CASE WHEN (NOT (goog_longitude IS NULL)) THEN goog_longitude ELSE CAST(longitude AS string) END) AS DOUBLE)
(CASE WHEN (in0.person_id = in1.person_id) THEN in1.person_id ELSE NULL END)

metadata.label: MultiFieldFormula_983
metadata.comment: Applies multi-column edits to cleanse and standardize address-related fields for better consistency in downstream reporting.

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (in0.address_id = in1.address_id) THEN in1.longitude ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN (in0.address_id = in1.address_id) THEN in1.latitude ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN (org_name = UPPER(org_name_lag1)) THEN org_name_lag1 WHEN (org_name = UPPER(org_name_lead1)) THEN org_name_lead1 ELSE org_name END)
(LAG(org_name, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY prophecy_row_id NULLS FIRST))
(LEAD(org_name, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY prophecy_row_id NULLS FIRST))
